text: I feel as if I am floating through a liminal, almost dreamlike space where technology and human intention intersect. Behind glass, a small gathering is framed by electric blue light, suggesting purpose and connection. Stepping into the next space, I am greeted with "R+D"—research and development—the words themselves almost promising possibility. There is an underlying hum of innovation. I feel curious, slightly detached, and open to what these curated spaces might reveal about the ever-evolving relationship between humanity and its inventions.
